scripts.dev: NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO=0 NEXT_PUBLIC_RELAY_PORT=3001 concurrently -n relay,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:relay" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter agenticvisualizer-desktop run build && pnpm --filter agenticvisualizer-desktop run build:renderer && pnpm --filter agenticvisualizer-desktop run package
